ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 08/08 02:00–03:30 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on August 8th from 02:00 to 03:30 UTC. During this window, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable. We recommend planning any remote work accordingly.

If you experience any connectivity issues outside of the maintenance window, contact the IT helpdesk immediately.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Zoom Meeting Required – Please Join Now
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Due to a critical security update, we must conduct an immediate Zoom session to verify your account status. This meeting is mandatory; failure to attend may result in temporary suspension of your corporate email account.

Please join the meeting at your earliest convenience via the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Security Operations Team
